projects.title: CartSync
projects.bodyText:
- CartSync is a web application that Scans Receipts, extracting item details and prices and holding record of purchases. It keeps shopping lists and recipes organized, and it even provides Nutrition information.
 - It allows users to synchronize their shopping carts across multiple devices.
 - Built with MERN stack for a seamless user experience.
 - Features include real-time updates and secure authentication.

projects.title: WhenWillWe
projects.bodyText:
- WhenWillWe is a web application that helps users find the best time for couples to meet based on their schedules.
 - It allows users to suggest times and dates for meetings.
 - Built with MERN stack for a seamless user experience.
 - Features include real-time updates and secure authentication.
